name: Leagentdiary

author: KBLLR

description: A high-performance API server that provides OpenAI-compatible endpoints for MLX models. Developed using Python and powered by the FastAPI framework, it provides an efficient, scalable, and user-friendly solution for running MLX-based vision and language models locally with an OpenAI-compatible interface.
